title: Make the HQ game view mobile friendly
description: Add mobile responsiveness to the HQ game: touch handlers (drag/tap/pinch-to-zoom), responsive bottom sheet SidePanel, smart camera zoom, compact GameHeader.

dod.criterion: Touch handlers properly distinguish drag from tap from pinch-to-zoom
Camera fitToView correctly calculates zoom for mobile viewports
No hardcoded widths that break below 375px
Bottom sheet SidePanel handles iOS safe areas
GameHeader compact mode works without layout shifts
